_note: Phase 0 ground truth. official_total_sections are the published section counts of each in-scope act (the remainder beyond what is ingested is logged and known). in_scope_sections is the curated v1 target; ingesting most of it lands coverage in the 80-90% band. spot_check pins verbatim values and section counts to the bare-act text the agent did not generate, so content-accuracy tests never grade their own homework.

spot_check.verbatim: The State shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.
No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.

spot_check.verbatim_contains: intending to take dishonestly any movable property out of the possession of any person
twenty years from the date of filing
